mapper.select: SELECT r.*, u.nickname AS reporter_nickname, hu.nickname AS handle_user_nickname FROM report r LEFT JOIN `user` u ON r.reporter_id = u.id LEFT JOIN `user` hu ON r.handle_user_id = hu.id WHERE r.id = #{id} AND r.deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO report (reporter_id, target_type, target_id, reason_type, reason_detail, evidence_urls) VALUES (#{reporterId}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{reasonType}, #{reasonDetail}, #{evidenceUrls})
mapper.update:
UPDATE report
handle_status = #{handleStatus}, handle_result = #{handleResult}, handle_user_id = #{handleUserId}, handle_time = #{handleTime},
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT r.*, u.nickname AS reporter_nickname, hu.nickname AS handle_user_nickname FROM report r LEFT JOIN `user` u ON r.reporter_id = u.id LEFT JOIN `user` hu ON r.handle_user_id = hu.id WHERE r.deleted = 0 AND r.handle_status = #{handleStatus} AND r.target_type = #{targetType} ORDER BY r.create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM report WHERE deleted = 0 AND handle_status = #{handleStatus}
